text.title: Gdpr For Solo Saas Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for Gdpr For Solo Saas.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers for this engagement?

conclusion.verdict: precondition not met; route to a different methodology or skip.
hard skip condition triggered; do not apply.
apply rule data-inventory-required from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule lawful-basis-per-category from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule processor-dpa-tracked from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule breach-response-72h from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.

text.example: Engagement passes applies_if, none of skip_if match. The first non-skip rule signal evaluates to true → conclusion routes to that rule id → agent draft enforces the rule and attaches matching evidence.
